title: Check If N and Its Double Exist
titleCn: 检查整数及其两倍数是否存在

testcases.input: arr = [10,2,5,3] Output: true Explanation: For i = 0 and j = 2, arr[i] == 10 == 2 * 5 == 2 * arr[j]
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: For i = 0 and j = 2, arr[i] == 10 == 2 * 5 == 2 * arr[j]

testcases.input: arr = [3,1,7,11] Output: false Explanation: There is no i and j that satisfy the conditions.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: There is no i and j that satisfy the conditions.
